name: editor4c: Shift+Enter inserts a line break within the current block
_note:
Phase B — Shift+Enter (insertLineBreak) within a block. Formerly an _open_ blocker: it tripped the state_machine caret-projection invariant (radiant/state_machine.cpp) because the geometry resolver mapped the caret at end-of-block-after-
onto the void
element at offset 1 (out of bounds). Fixed by guarding both caret-projection paths (state_store_refresh_caret_projection + expected_legacy_caret_projection) to keep the valid boundary projection when the geometry endpoint is invalid. Verifies AA then Shift+Enter then BB all land in the h1.
